text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: BONO! We have an emergency!Carrot Ranger is... is...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: COMING TO OUR EVENT RAAAACE!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow. So she's the special guest<n>this year?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! And the winner gets to perform<n>on stage
with her!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Graaaah! There's no way I'm gonna<n>lose now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Good luck, Biko! ♪ I'll bake you a<n>cake to help.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wait! Can you help me with<n>practice before
that?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Sure! You want me to wear a mask<n>and pretend
I'm Carrot Ranger, right?<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I can't meet her without<n>rehearsing first!
Thanks a lot!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger?
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now you bad guys should<n>eat this cake
and get along, you hear?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hold on! That's what you wouldsay! But Carrot Ranger would belike...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ohoho! Seems like you're in quite the<n>bind, girls!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Th-that voice...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I, Seeking the Pearl, shall play the role<n>of Carrot
Ranger for you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, really? I know you'll be<n>great at it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Never fear! ♪ I shall show you all<n>what the
world-renowned Carrot<n>Ranger sounds like!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
That's right—'Tis I, Carrot Ranger!<n>Nutritious!
Virtuous! Carotene Charge!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: C-CARROT RANGERRR!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Biko Pegasus! Thank you for all<n>your
passionate support!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Me?! Y-you're a hero! Of course I'd<n>cheer for
you!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to performing<n>with you! Now,
let me see you run like<n>the wind!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You're looking forward to it?! Carrot<n>Ranger is
gonna watch me race...<n>ME?! Oh my gosh, oh my
gosh, oh<n>my...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(Gah! I'm just rambling! Carrot<n>Ranger is talking
to me and I can't<n>even speak properly!)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Wheeze... Why can't I dothis?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: We made it! Over here, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, you want us to cheer on Biko<n>from here?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that! I want Biko to win too!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Ready... YOU CAN DO IT!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: (I can hear them. They're cheering<n>for me!)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(Biko Pegasus, get it together! You<n>really want
them to see you like<n>this?!)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(No way! If I were Carrot Ranger... If I<n>were a
hero...)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I'd run with COUUUURAGE!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
Ha, ha, ha! Well done! I can see by<n>the way you
run that you have a<n>heart of justice!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yaaaaay! She saw me! Now I really<n>know I'm
going to win my race!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: ...Good luck! You're gonna go far,<n>Pegasus Girl! ♪
